glass-atrium.label: The Bar
glass-atrium.title: The Glass Atrium
glass-atrium.body1: The centerpiece of Coco Maya is the open-air glass atrium with a retractable roof that opens to the San Diego sky. Teal bar tiles, rattan bar chairs, hanging botanicals, and a cocktail program worth sitting down for.
glass-atrium.body2: Whether the roof is open or closed, the atmosphere inside the atrium is unlike anything else in Little Italy.
glass-atrium.imageAlt: Glass atrium bar at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego

barDetail.title: The teal bar at the center of it all
barDetail.body1: The centerpiece of Coco Maya is the teal tile bar — a full-service craft cocktail program built under the glass atrium, surrounded by hanging botanicals and the arched architecture that makes this space instantly recognizable.
barDetail.body2: From the first margarita to the last negroni, every drink is made here. The bar seats guests directly, with rattan bar chairs and a marble counter that runs the full length of the space.
barDetail.imageAlt: The teal bar at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego

elevated-patio.label: Outdoor Dining
elevated-patio.title: The Elevated Patio
elevated-patio.body1: The outdoor patio at Coco Maya is one of the most distinctive dining spaces in San Diego. Pink striped umbrellas, lush tropical greenery, and the Little Italy skyline as the backdrop.
elevated-patio.body2: Perfect for brunch, an afternoon cocktail, and private events. The patio is available for full buyouts and partial reservations.
elevated-patio.imageAlt: Elevated patio with city skyline at Coco Maya San Diego

dining-room.label: Private Dining
dining-room.title: The Dining Room
dining-room.body1: The interior dining room features warm rattan chairs, a hand-woven ceiling, illuminated shelving, and the signature tropical mural. Intimate, curated, and completely private when needed.
dining-room.body2: Available for private event buyouts, rehearsal dinners, and large group bookings.
dining-room.imageAlt: Private dining room at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego
